title: AI Business Automation Specialist
mode: Hybrid (Self Learning + Mentor Validation + Execution Lab)

programOverview.objective: Train engineers to identify, design, build and deploy AI-driven automation systems that reduce manual effort and produce measurable business ROI.
forWho: Automation engineers, developers, and solution architects
Business analysts transitioning to automation roles
Early-career engineers wanting practical automation experience
keyOutcomes: Map business processes and identify high-impact automation opportunities.
Build end-to-end automation workflows using no-code/low-code platforms, APIs, and RPA patterns.
Integrate Document AI, OCR, LLMs and standard ML models into automation pipelines.
Deploy automation with monitoring, KPI dashboards and runbooks.
Prepare employer-ready capstone deployment and demonstrate ROI.

responsibilities: Validate industry thinking and project selection.
Review project logic, architecture, and test plans.
Simulate employer-style questioning for capstone interviews.
Improve business communication (deliverables, memos, demo pitch).
Ensure projects meet deployable-quality standards (documentation, security, runbook).

curriculum.title: Business Process Intelligence & Automation Strategy
coreObjectives: Understand operational architecture of SMEs and mid-sized enterprises
Differentiate between manual, rule-based, and AI-driven workflows
practicalImplementation: Create detailed process flow diagram (Lucidchart / Miro)
Quantify impact (time saved, error reduction, cost saving)
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Automation opportunity must show measurable business improvement.

curriculum.title: Prompt Engineering & AI Workflow Architecture
coreObjectives: Design structured prompts for deterministic output
practicalImplementation: Develop 2-step AI agent performing business task
weeklyDeliverable: AI agent mini-workflow deployed as API or notebook demo
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Output consistency ≥ defined threshold (manual validation sample test).

curriculum.title: Workflow Automation & API Orchestration
practicalImplementation: Connect automation platform with external API
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Workflow must run without manual intervention for test dataset.

curriculum.title: RPA & Low-Code Automation Platforms
practicalImplementation: Build RPA workflow for repetitive task
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Automation must reduce manual effort by >50%.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project & Production Deployment
coreObjectives: Design and build end-to-end automation project
Deploy to production with full documentation
Present business impact and employer readiness
practicalImplementation: Create business impact and demo materials
weeklyDeliverable: GitHub repo with complete code and tests
Business impact memo with ROI estimate
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Project must demonstrate >30% cost savings or time reduction.

capstone.objective: Design, build and deploy a production-grade automation for an enterprise process (examples: AP automation, customer onboarding, maintenance ticket automation).
requirements: Problem statement + business case + KPIs (time saved, error reduction, cost saved)
End-to-end pipeline: ingestion → processing (AI/RPA) → execution → monitoring
Secure API/connectors, error handling, and idempotency
Dockerized components or clear infra-as-code / deployment steps
KPI dashboard and runbook for operations
deliverables: GitHub repo with code, tests, and deployment instructions
Live demo link or recorded walkthrough
Business impact memo (1–2 pages) with ROI estimate
Mentor sign-off + mock employer Q&A summary

industryExposure.minimumIndustriesCovered: Students must complete at least 3 industries
datasetRequirements: At least 2 real or realistic anonymized datasets (transaction logs, invoices, CRM exports, sensor logs)
6–12 months of transactional history preferred; ≥10k rows desirable
OCR document samples (invoices/receipts) for Document AI tasks
Mock API endpoints for CRM/ERP integrations
automationDashboardExpectations: At least one deployment-ready automation system (end-to-end)
- Business metric impacted (e.g., reduction in handle time)
Runbook covering deployment, rollback, escalation, and SLA targets
privacyCompliance: Use anonymized or synthetic data for PII-sensitive tasks
mentorSignoff: Mentor must validate: dataset adequacy, deployment steps, KPI mapping, and employer-style readiness
